title: lepidium puberulum
intro: Lepidium puberulum, also known as hairy pepperwort or hairy cress, is a perennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepidium puberulum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
